dict.string: ConstructionOS needs camera access for site photos, QR code scanning, and condition reports.
ConstructionOS needs photo library access to attach site photos to reports and documents.
ConstructionOS uses your location for GPS equipment tracking, geofencing, and nearby rental search.
ConstructionOS uses background location for automatic crew clock-in/out at jobsite geofences.
ConstructionOS uses Face ID to secure your account and protect sensitive project data.
ConstructionOS adds inspection deadlines and bid due dates to your calendar.
ConstructionOS adds inspection deadlines and bid due dates to your calendar.
ConstructionOS needs microphone access for video calls with crew and stakeholders.
ConstructionOS accesses contacts to find crew members and subcontractors.
